title: PR #87: Fix CI Linting Gate Failures
description: Diagnose and fix all CI linting gate failures in PR #87 (SSE2 and GNU_SOURCE includes). Goal: all CI checks pass.

stories.title: Diagnose PR #87 linting failures
stories.description: Check CI status, identify all failing linting gates, understand root causes.
acceptanceCriteria: PR #87 CI status checked via gh pr checks
All failing checks identified (clang-format, clang-tidy, editorconfig, Analyze)
Specific error messages captured from failed CI jobs
Root causes documented for each failure

stories.title: Fix identified linting issues
stories.description: Apply fixes to make all linting gates pass.

stories.title: Verify local compilation
acceptanceCriteria: All tests pass: meson test -C build

stories.title: Push fixes and monitor CI
stories.description: Commit and push fixes, verify all CI gates pass on GitHub.
acceptanceCriteria: All CI checks pass (clang-format, clang-tidy, Analyze, editorconfig)
PR #87 shows green checkmarks on all required checks

stories.title: Architect verification
stories.description: Get architect review confirming linting fixes are correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Code changes verified to be minimal and correct
